radiative_boundary_interpretation: rcExternalTemperature carries emissivity/Tsur and AGENT-277 microcases show those inputs affect wallHeatFlux; radiation is embedded in total wallHeatFlux, not exported as a separate qr term.
one_d_agent_instruction: For CFD-informed replay, do not add a separate radiation term on top of CFD wallHeatFlux. For predictive 1D setup, include a radiation-capable external loss model or explicitly document radiation disabled as a sensitivity, not CFD parity.
